title: dyssodia pulcherrima
intro: Dyssodia pulcherrima, also known as the Mexican horse gentian or Mexican gentian, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and the southwestern United States. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a diuretic and to reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Dyssodia pulcherrima include its potential to help with urinary tract issues and to reduce fever. The plant can be prepared as an infusion or tincture for herbal remedies, and it is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat a range of ailments.
